'''鈭歡-g-r''' ('''kagagar''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:whirry|whirry]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-g-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:whirry|whirry]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歡-g-r
|-
! Lemma
| kagagar
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thigagar|thigagar]] || [[word:jigagar|jigagar]] || [[word:shigagar|shigagar]] || [[word:kigagar|kigagar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthugagar|thuthugagar]] || [[word:jujugagar|jujugagar]] || [[word:shushugagar|shushugagar]] || [[word:kukugagar|kukugagar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thugagar|thugagar]] || [[word:jugagar|jugagar]] || [[word:shugagar|shugagar]] || [[word:kugagar|kugagar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thugagar|thugagar]] || [[word:jugagar|jugagar]] || [[word:shugagar|shugagar]] || [[word:kugagar|kugagar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thegagar|thegagar]] || [[word:jegagar|jegagar]] || [[word:shegagar|shegagar]] || [[word:kegagar|kegagar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothogagar|thothogagar]] || [[word:jojogagar|jojogagar]] || [[word:shoshogagar|shoshogagar]] || [[word:kokogagar|kokogagar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thogagar|thogagar]] || [[word:jogagar|jogagar]] || [[word:shogagar|shogagar]] || [[word:kogagar|kogagar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thogagar|thogagar]] || [[word:jogagar|jogagar]] || [[word:shogagar|shogagar]] || [[word:kogagar|kogagar]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:gagar|gagar]] || [[word:gagar|gagar]] || [[word:gagar|gagar]] || [[word:gagar|gagar]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:gagar|gagar]] || [[word:gagar|gagar]] || [[word:gagar|gagar]] || [[word:gagar|gagar]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:gagar|gagar]] || [[word:gagar|gagar]] || [[word:gagar|gagar]] || [[word:gagar|gagar]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:gagar|gagar]] || [[word:gagar|gagar]] || [[word:gagar|gagar]] || [[word:gagar|gagar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙gagar|th忙gagar]] || [[word:j忙gagar|j忙gagar]] || [[word:sh忙gagar|sh忙gagar]] || [[word:k忙gagar|k忙gagar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathagagar|thathagagar]] || [[word:jajagagar|jajagagar]] || [[word:shashagagar|shashagagar]] || [[word:kakagagar|kakagagar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thagagar|thagagar]] || [[word:jagagar|jagagar]] || [[word:shagagar|shagagar]] || [[word:kagagar|kagagar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thagagar|thagagar]] || [[word:jagagar|jagagar]] || [[word:shagagar|shagagar]] || [[word:kagagar|kagagar]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shagagar|shagagar]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshagagar|goshagagar]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishagagar|gokishagagar]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shagagarn眉|shagagarn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshagagarnkn眉|goshagagarnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishagagarn眉|gokishagagarn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shagagarsh毛|shagagarsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshagagarnksh毛|goshagagarnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishagagarsh毛|gokishagagarsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagagarro|shagagarro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagagarnkro|goshagagarnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagagarro|gokishagagarro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shagagarmu|shagagarmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagagarnkmu|goshagagarnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagagarmu|gokishagagarmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shagagarsher|shagagarsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshagagarnksher|goshagagarnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishagagarsher|gokishagagarsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shagagarng|shagagarng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshagagarnkng|goshagagarnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishagagarng|gokishagagarng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shagagarya|shagagarya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshagagarnkya|goshagagarnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishagagarya|gokishagagarya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shagagaryam|shagagaryam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshagagarnkyam|goshagagarnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishagagaryam|gokishagagaryam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shagagarn眉sh毛|shagagarn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshagagarnkn眉sh毛|goshagagarnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishagagarn眉sh毛|gokishagagarn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagagarn眉ro|shagagarn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagagarnkn眉ro|goshagagarnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagagarn眉ro|gokishagagarn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shagagarn眉mu|shagagarn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagagarnkn眉mu|goshagagarnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagagarn眉mu|gokishagagarn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shagagarsh毛n眉|shagagarsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshagagarnksh毛n眉|goshagagarnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishagagarsh毛n眉|gokishagagarsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagagarsh毛ro|shagagarsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagagarnksh毛ro|goshagagarnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagagarsh毛ro|gokishagagarsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shagagarsh毛mu|shagagarsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagagarnksh毛mu|goshagagarnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagagarsh毛mu|gokishagagarsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shagagarron眉|shagagarron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshagagarnkron眉|goshagagarnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishagagarron眉|gokishagagarron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shagagarrosh毛|shagagarrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshagagarnkrosh毛|goshagagarnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishagagarrosh毛|gokishagagarrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shagagarromu|shagagarromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagagarnkromu|goshagagarnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagagarromu|gokishagagarromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shagagarmun眉|shagagarmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshagagarnkmun眉|goshagagarnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishagagarmun眉|gokishagagarmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shagagarmush毛|shagagarmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshagagarnkmush毛|goshagagarnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishagagarmush毛|gokishagagarmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagagarmuro|shagagarmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagagarnkmuro|goshagagarnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagagarmuro|gokishagagarmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==

{{wordpage|d414c41}}
